programs.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programs.desc: Episode 3, Season 1. Unique Japanese egg dishes, such as raw egg over rice, are popular with international visitors. Visit farms that produce eggs safe to eat raw, and enjoy a variety of dishes at a long-established restaurant in Kyoto.

programs.title: Science View
programs.desc: . Squid and cuttlefish use camouflage not just to hide but to communicate. Vanguard Researchers explores the mechanism behind plant immunity. Tomoko Tashiro, Naoko Yamazaki, Michelle Yamamoto, Yoichi Sato, Tomoko Tina Kimura, Rena Yamada, Ross Mihara, Rachel Walzer.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: My Street Piano
programs.desc: . Shibuya is one of Tokyo's largest cities. A piano is placed near a ticket gate at the station, and people stop to play from their heart.

programs.title: Sumopedia
programs.desc: . Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport’s techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.
